policy.resolutionRule: Every Runtime promotion record must declare one cataloged quality gate profile when the consuming project enables promotion profiles.
policy.proofShapeRule: Proof artifacts must satisfy the proof shape associated with the selected profile; profile family and host checker must not be inferred ad hoc from candidate name or script behavior.
policy.hostCheckerRule: Each active promotion profile must have exactly one primary host checker command, with any extra gates recorded as supporting host checks.
policy.nonApplicableFieldRule: Promotion records may use `n/a` for fields that are not part of the selected proof shape, but the selector, family, proof shape, and primary host checker must still match the chosen catalog entry.

notes: Directive Kernel does not ship the old workspace-specific promotion profile catalog.
Consuming projects may add bounded promotion profiles here when they also own the required checks, host proofs, and rollback policy.
